cards.title: JSON Seed Data
cards.body: All content lives in backend/seeds/data/ as structured JSON files. Sections, exam questions, and glossary terms are authored here. A $ref system allows splitting large sections into modular files that are resolved at seed time.

cards.title: Flask API
cards.body: A Python Flask backend reads the seed JSON, stores it in a file-based database (JsonDatabase), and serves it through RESTful endpoints. Three blueprints handle /api/guide, /api/exam, and /api/glossary.

cards.title: Next.js Frontend
cards.body: A React 19 frontend built with Next.js 15 App Router fetches data from the API and renders it using a block-based component system. Redux Toolkit manages client state with persistence via redux-persist. Material UI provides theming.
